positive: A vibrant, high-contrast vector illustration of a mystical woodland forest scene. Central subject is a glowing bioluminescent deer silhouette standing in a grouping of ancient, stylized trees and oversized foliage. The mood is ethereal and magical, rendered with strong negative space and bold outlines, suitable for a t-shirt print. Use a deep jewel-tone color palette (sapphire blues, emerald greens, amethyst purples) accented by glowing gold and neon cyan highlights. Composition must be symmetrical and centered, creating a captivating circular or square design element. Studio quality vector art, highly detailed linework, minimalist yet rich, ready for screen printing or direct-to-garment printing.
